summary: Solid test suite with good organization and strong act-based integration testing, but has notable coverage gaps. Missing explicit tests for peerDependencies and optionalDependencies (both parsed by code but untested), incomplete PEP 440 specifier coverage (~=, ===, !=, <=, <), and no tests for deny-list precedence over allow-list. Unit tests are well-structured with proper mocking and isolation; act workflow tests comprehensively validate CI execution across 3 scenarios. Would catch basic regressions but missing edge cases that could slip through.
